title: gyrocheilos retrotrichus
intro: Gyrocheilos retrotrichus, also known as the hairy lip orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Gyrocheilos retrotrichus include its ability to treat fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
